# Research: Synthetic Closer Ticket (GOOD — canonical command)

## Summary
Synthetic fixture for R-CSIS-B2 regression test. This bundle uses the canonical
expensive-tier runner command and contains no forbidden `node --test` invocations.

## Findings

The release gate should be verified before closing. Per the closer runbook, the
full expensive suite must run through the tier runner:

```bash
RUN_EXPENSIVE_TESTS=1 npm run test:expensive
```

All tests passed. The soak test completed successfully.

## Constraints
None identified. Closer must use `npm run test:expensive`, never `node --test <path>`.
